titleStmt.title: SII 5.441: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 441. (A.R. No. 149-A of 1894). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tribhu vanaccakra vatti koṉerimelkoṇṭāṉ kiḻvempanāṭṭut
tirunelveliyuṭaiyār koyiṟ patipātamulapaṭṭuṭaip pañcācāriyar tevakaṉmikaḷuk
ku vaṭatalaiccempiṉāṭṭuk kiḻaikkoṭumaḷūrāṉa maturotayanallūr Araiyaṉ pūvaṉāṉa ve
ṇāṭuṭaiyār(t) tirunelveliyil melaikkāṉakaraiyile Eḻuntaruḷivitta Āḷuṭaippiḷ
ḷaiyāṟku tiruppaṭimāṟ ṟuḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭum nimantaṅkaḷukku muḷḷināṭṭu ceravanmāteviccatu
rvvedi maṅkalattuk kiḻpiṭākai kaliceyaṉmaṅkalattil Aṅkavayicciyaril paracirāmaṉukkuc civitamā
ṉa pāṭakappaṭi paṭṭa nilam veliyum nāṟṟaṅkāl nilam mākāṇiyun toṭṭanilam Iraṇṭumāvum ma
ṉai yiraṇṭum muṉṉuṭaiyārum mutalum Uḻavum(ñ) civitamun tavirttuk kārāṇmai miyāṭciyuṅ kaṭamai
yum Antarāyamum viṉiyokamum Uḻutāṉkuṭiyum pāṭikāvalun taruvatāṉa Accuṅ kāriyavārāṭciyum ve
ṭṭippāṭṭamum pañcupili cantuvikkarakappeṟum poṉvariyum maṟṟum Epperppaṭṭaṉavum Uṭppaṭa
Eṭṭāvata ṉetirāmāṇṭi ṉetirāmāṇṭu mutal tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāka Iṭappeṟaveṇume
ṉṟu Aiyyaṉ maḻavarāyar namakkuc coṉṉamaiyil Āḷuṭaiyapiḷḷaiyāṟkut tiruppaṭimāṟ ṟuḷ
ḷiṭṭu veṇṭum nimantaṅkaḷukku muḷḷi(nā)nāṭṭuc ceravaṉmāteviccaturvvedi maṅkalattuk ki
ḻpiṭākai kaliceyaṉmaṅkalattil Aṅkavayicciyaril paracirāmaṉukku civitamāṉa pāṭakappaṭi
nilam veliyum nāṟṟaṅkāl nilam mākāṇiyun toṭṭanilam Iraṇṭu māvum maṉai Iraṇṭum muṉ
ṉuṭaiyārum mutalum Uḻavum(ñ) civitamum(n) tavirttuk kārāṇmai miyāṭciyum kaṭamaiyum Antar
āyamum viṉiyokamum Uḻutāṉkuṭi pāṭikāvalun taruvatāṉa Accuṅ kāriyavārāṭciyum veṭṭipāṭ
ṭamum pañcupili cantuvikkarakappeṟum poṉvariyum maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭ(ṭa)ṉavum Uṭppaṭa I
vvāṇṭu mutal tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāka Iṭṭu variyilā reḻuttiṭṭa Uḷvariyuṅ keḻviyu
n taraccoṉṉom kaikkoṇṭu Ippaṭi cantirātittavaṟ celvatāka kallilum(ñ) cempilum v
eṭṭivittukkoḷka . Ivai Arumpūṟ kūṟṟattup putupperkkuḷat tāḻvāṉ Āṇṭappirāṉ Aḻakaṉā
ṉa Aḻakiyapāṇṭiya viḻupparaiyaṉ Eḻuttu Aṇṭaṉāṭṭup perumaṇalūr Araiyaṉ muṭivaḻaṅkum p
erumāṉāṉa vikkiramapāṇṭiya Uttaramantari Eḻuttu yāṇṭu Eṭṭāvatu nāḷ Āyirattirupattu Eḻu
Digital edition of SII 5.441 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
